messages.content: Detect the idea I described most frequently today and craft a 30-second pitch: hook, value, proof/example, simple ask.
Checking today’s lifelogs for common ideas...

Most-seen idea today: RACI model to run projects, plus bi‑weekly mentoring loop. 🗿

- Hook: Work slow. Decisions stuck. Dug bring simple map: RACI. 🗿
- Value: One owner. One doer. Clear who consult, who inform. Faster moves. Fewer clashes. Scale clinic + AI together.
- Proof: You say: \"אני פשוט רוצה שתהיה שתהיה איזשהי מערכת שעובדת לבד.\" 🗿 Use mentoring pilot: אורי = Accountable. ריבי = Responsible. אליאס = Consulted. אתה = Informed. Meetings every שני שבועות. Agenda fixed.
- Ask: Say “כן” לפיילוט 2 שבועות. Dug make one RACI grid, one standing meet, one status report. Start שבוע הבא.

summary: Idea Pitch: Hook, Value, Proof, Ask
